heading: Limitation on expenditure of funds for compensation of International Boundary Commissioner to actual hours worked
label: 268c Limitation on expenditure of funds for compensation of International Boundary Commissioner to actual hours worked
text: Funds appropriated on and after , or otherwise made available under this Act or any other Act may be expended for compensation of the United States Commissioner of the International Boundary Commission, United States and Canada, only for actual hours worked by such Commissioner.September 30, 1996
notes: Similar ProvisionsSimilar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, , .Pub. L. 103–317, title V, § 503108 Stat. 1764Aug. 26, 1994, , .Pub. L. 103–121, title V, § 503107 Stat. 1189Oct. 27, 1993
